objective: Create a governed candidate signal registry and generate a signal panel that conforms to the V3.49 signal contract, using only V3.48 diagnostic state data.
forbidden: Do not read raw daily CSVs.
Do not compute forward returns from raw or unadjusted close.
Do not validate IC, win rate, returns, or drawdowns.
Do not run a portfolio backtest.
Do not promote any candidate signal into a model.
acceptance: Candidate registry must have stable signal_id and governance metadata.
Signal panel must satisfy V3.49 signal_panel_contract required columns.
Signal rows must be generated only from V3.48 history-available quality_ok states.
No return, PnL, NAV, Sharpe, drawdown, or performance columns may be produced.
The report must state that no performance validation occurred.
